summary: Tested CastleAdmin driver credentials management feature. Backend API endpoints are not accessible (404 errors). Frontend login works but Portal Login Credentials section is missing from driver profiles.

ui_bugs.issue: Portal Login Credentials section not visible in driver profiles
Create Login, Reset Password, and Remove buttons not found

integration_issues.issue: Complete feature appears to be missing from UI despite code implementation

passed_tests: Login functionality with demo credentials works
Driver list displays correctly with 5 drivers
Driver selection and profile viewing works
Backend API endpoints exist in code (route files present)
success_percentage: Backend: 0% (all endpoints inaccessible), Frontend: 30% (basic navigation works, main feature missing)
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: 1) Fix API endpoint routing - all three credential management endpoints return 404. 2) Investigate why Portal Login Credentials section is not rendering in driver profiles despite code implementation. 3) Verify deployment and environment configuration for Next.js API routes.
